bookingConfirmation.subject: Booking Confirmed - {{reference}}
bookingConfirmation.body: Thank you for booking with LuxuryStay. Your reservation has been confirmed.
bookingConfirmation.footer: If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.
bookingConfirmation.automated: This is an automated email from LuxuryStay.

bookingCancellation.subject: Booking Cancelled - {{reference}}
bookingCancellation.title: Booking Cancelled
bookingCancellation.mistake: If this was a mistake, please contact us.

passwordReset.subject: Password Reset - LuxuryStay
passwordReset.title: Password Reset
passwordReset.body: You requested a password reset. Click the link below to reset your password:
passwordReset.expiry: This link expires in 24 hours. If you didn't request this, ignore this email.
